channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-10
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. The `statcheck` and `escicheck` projects have both received updates, with `statcheck` focusing on administrative updates and `escicheck` syncing changes from `escicheckapp` to bring in new features from `effectcheck` version `0.6.13`. Meanwhile, `docpluck` has made notable fixes to its 'glyph' and 'render' modules, and `coarse` has re-enabled Fable 5 in its model picker. Additionally, `regcheck` is making strides in implementing Registered Report functionality, and `auto-zcurve` has revised its validation note with a new citation. These connections between projects demonstrate the collaborative spirit of our community, and we celebrate the progress being made to advance open-source research tools. Noteworthy updates also include `output-it-forward` adding a Chrome Webstore link and `giladfeldman/docpluck` resolving residual prose shapes, showcasing the community's dedication to improving and expanding its tools.

40 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

metacheck17 commits
docpluck14 commits
regcheck9 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed, specifically merging the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch from the GitHub repository `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` into itself. The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch also received "admin updates", as stated in the commit message. No other branches were mentioned in the provided commit messages, indicating that all recent work was focused on `feature-non-apa-newer`. The merge commit suggests that changes from the remote repository were incorporated into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. The nature of the "admin updates" is not specified beyond the commit message.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 6 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The staging branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The first phase of development involved adding "registered report mode", as stated in the commit message "first phase: registered report mode". Further development on the staging branch included the "second phase RR dev" and the "third phase of RR creation", indicating a multi-phase approach to implementing Registered Report (RR) functionality. Additionally, the staging branch received a "small fix" and "budget-saving changes", which suggest minor adjustments and optimizations were made. The specificity of 'missing' judgements was also targeted for improvement, according to the commit message "improve specificity on 'missing' judgements".

6 commit(s) today:

  • 35075aa [staging] third phase of RR creation — Jamie Cummins
  • 6d30479 [staging] stage 2 RR dev — Jamie Cummins
  • 60f395c [staging] first phase: registered report mode — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
